title: hieracium stelligerum subsp. stelligerum
intro: Hieracium stelligerum subsp. stelligerum, also known as Mountain Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Hieracium stelligerum subsp. stelligerum typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be infused in hot water or used as a tincture.
